tasks.description: Rewrite Node.js server to use HTTP notification instead of file watching.

steps.description: Implement state management (filename, svgContent, lastUpdate)
Create HTML template with filename title, SVG container, time display, and reminder
Implement GET / endpoint to serve the HTML page
Implement GET /svg endpoint to return cached SVG content
Implement GET /events SSE endpoint with update and shutdown event types
Implement POST /update endpoint to receive Neovim notifications
Implement POST /shutdown endpoint to notify browser closure
Remove fileWatcher code entirely

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Server serves HTML page with title, centered SVG container, time display, and save reminder. GET /svg returns cached SVG content. GET /events provides SSE with update and shutdown event types. POST /update accepts {filename, filepath} and broadcasts update event via SSE. POST /shutdown broadcasts shutdown event to all connected clients. No fileWatcher code exists in server.js.

unit: Server starts on specified port and responds to GET / with valid HTML
GET /svg returns 404 when no SVG is cached
GET /svg returns cached SVG content after POST /update
POST /update with valid data stores filename, reads file, caches SVG content, and returns 200
POST /update with missing file returns 404
POST /shutdown returns 200 and marks shutdown state
SSE client receives 'connected' comment on connect
SSE client receives 'update' event after POST /update is called
SSE client receives 'shutdown' event after POST /shutdown is called
integration: Full flow: POST /update triggers SSE update event with correct filename and time
Full flow: POST /shutdown triggers SSE shutdown event and client can handle it
e2e-manual: Open browser to server URL, verify HTML page renders correctly with all elements
Trigger POST /update, verify browser updates SVG and time without full page reload
Trigger POST /shutdown, verify browser displays shutdown message

tasks.task: Add HTTP client module for server communication
tasks.description: Create a new Lua module to handle HTTP communication with the preview server.

steps.description: Create lua/plantuml/http_client.lua module
Implement notify_update(host, port, filename, filepath) function
Implement notify_shutdown(host, port) function
Use vim.system() or curl for HTTP requests with proper error handling

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Module exports notify_update() and notify_shutdown() functions. Functions are async and accept callbacks. HTTP errors are handled gracefully with vim.notify. Module uses vim.system() for HTTP requests when available, falls back to curl if needed.

unit: notify_update() constructs correct POST request body with filename and filepath
notify_shutdown() sends POST request to /shutdown endpoint
HTTP error responses trigger vim.notify with error message
Module handles connection refused gracefully
Module handles timeout gracefully
integration: notify_update() successfully communicates with running test server
notify_shutdown() successfully communicates with running test server

tasks.task: Refactor preview.lua to use HTTP notification
tasks.description: Update preview.lua to remove inject_script and use HTTP notification for SVG updates.

steps.description: Remove inject_script() function entirely
Update preview_svg() to use new server flow and HTTP notification
Update refresh_svg_preview() to use HTTP notification instead of file watching
Add buffer switch detection in preview_svg() to update diagram when switching buffers
Track current preview filename to detect buffer changes
Update stop_svg_preview() to call HTTP notify_shutdown

tasks.acceptance-criteria: inject_script() function is removed. preview_svg() generates SVG, starts server if needed, opens browser to server root URL (not direct SVG file), and sends HTTP POST /update. refresh_svg_preview() generates SVG and sends HTTP POST /update. When user switches to a different .puml buffer and saves, the preview updates to show the new diagram. stop_svg_preview() sends HTTP POST /shutdown before cleanup.

unit: preview_svg() calls executor.run_plantuml() with correct arguments
preview_svg() does not call inject_script() (function removed)
preview_svg() opens browser to server root URL, not SVG file path
refresh_svg_preview() calls HTTP notify_update after PlantUML completes
stop_svg_preview() calls HTTP notify_shutdown
Buffer switch detection correctly identifies when preview should update
integration: Full preview flow: preview_svg() generates SVG, server caches it, browser displays it
Refresh flow: save triggers refresh_svg_preview(), HTTP notification sent, browser updates
Buffer switch flow: switching to another .puml buffer and saving updates the preview
e2e-manual: Open browser preview, modify .puml file, save, verify browser updates without full reload
Switch to another .puml buffer, save, verify browser shows the new diagram

tasks.task: Update server tests for new architecture
tasks.description: Update test_server.lua to test the new server architecture.

steps.description: Remove tests for fileWatcher functionality
Add tests for GET / endpoint returning HTML
Add tests for GET /svg endpoint
Add tests for POST /update endpoint
Add tests for POST /shutdown endpoint
Add tests for SSE event types (update, shutdown)

tasks.acceptance-criteria: All fileWatcher-related tests removed. Tests exist for GET /, GET /svg, POST /update, POST /shutdown, and SSE event types. All tests pass when run with PlenaryBustedDirectory.

unit: Test file is valid Lua and loads without errors
All describe blocks have at least one it block
All assertions use correct Plenary syntax

tasks.task: Update preview tests for new architecture
tasks.description: Update test_preview.lua to test the new preview flow without inject_script.

steps.description: Remove tests for inject_script() function
Update SVG preview tests to mock HTTP client instead of inject_script
Add tests for buffer switch detection
Add tests for HTTP notification calls

tasks.acceptance-criteria: All inject_script-related tests removed. Tests verify HTTP notify_update is called after SVG generation. Tests verify HTTP notify_shutdown is called when stopping preview. Tests verify buffer switch detection works correctly. All tests pass.

unit: Test file is valid Lua and loads without errors
No references to inject_script in test file
HTTP client mocks are properly set up and torn down

tasks.description: Run full integration tests and update documentation to reflect new architecture.

steps.description: Run all tests to verify no regressions
Manually test full preview workflow in Neovim
Update README_FOR_AGENT.md if needed
Verify other commands (CreateSVG, CreatePNG, CreateUTXT) still work

tasks.acceptance-criteria: All tests pass. Manual testing confirms preview works correctly: browser opens with HTML page, save triggers update, SVG and time update without full page reload, buffer switch works, shutdown closes preview. Other commands (PlantumlCreateSVG, PlantumlCreatePNG, PlantumlCreateUTXT) still function correctly.

e2e-manual: Full workflow: :PlantumlPreview opens browser with HTML page containing title, centered SVG, time
Save .puml file: browser updates SVG and time without full page reload
Switch to another .puml buffer and save: browser shows new diagram
Close preview: browser shows shutdown message
